objective: Every regime must have explicit qualifying conditions and validation across different instruments, times, and markets.

regime_results.condition_definition: ret_4 > train q60, close > rolling MA32, and volume rank >= 0.35
regime_results.target_definition: future 8h return >= train q70 and interim drawdown not worse than stress-scaled drawdown floor

regime_results.condition_definition: |ret_4| <= train q40, realized-vol rank <= 0.45, and range rank <= 0.55
regime_results.target_definition: future 8h absolute return and future 8h range both below train q35

regime_results.condition_definition: realized-vol rank >= 0.85, range rank >= 0.85, or ret_4 <= train q10
regime_results.target_definition: future 8h absolute return >= train q90 or future max drawdown <= train q10 drawdown

regime_results.condition_definition: |stretch from MA32| >= train q80 and volume rank >= 0.25
regime_results.target_definition: future 8h move reverses current MA32 stretch sign with magnitude >= train q65

regime_results.condition_definition: volume rank <= 0.30, raw volume <= train q30, or IBKR count <= train q30 when count is available
regime_results.target_definition: future 4h median volume <= train q30, or future IBKR count <= train q30 when count is available

decision.not_promoted_reason: This run validates condition coverage breadth; it does not create a non-observe release candidate with path-specific edge.
decision.next_action: Use the cross-market condition matrix to target missing support/Wilson/ECE blockers; do not promote any regime until it passes unchanged thresholds across the required market contexts.
